column1: # Central Microsoft product-icon catalog for draw.io C4 diagrams.
# Curated, renamed subset of the official Microsoft icon packs; grow on demand.
# Columns (tab/space separated): KEY  FILE  PACK  ALIASES
#   FILE     path relative to this directory
#   ALIASES  comma-separated PlantUML sprite / component-id names that map here
# The shared puml_drawio lib base64-embeds FILE into the .drawio so icons render
# via the draw.io CLI without depending on its bundled shape libraries.
# Licences: see LICENSES/ (Microsoft Terms of Use / FAQ must travel with these).
